name: Revealer.cc
description: Discord-based account-checker & breach lookup Tool: https://revealer.cc. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1164 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Revealer.cc output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Revealer.cc output file to parse instead of running it live.
